creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 213420
Crash with SteelSeries Siberia 350 USB gaming headset

In this case I refrained from using the integral Chicony webcam. 

Instead, whilst running Teams I: 

1. connected the SteelSeries headset to the HP notebook
2. connected the USB device to the guest
3. used the VirtualBox status bar to enable audio input.
